author: user_001
text: Yaar road condition bohot kharab hai, but the new market lights look nice at night.

author: user_002
text: Food scene mast hai here, but parking issue har weekend pe ho jata hai.

author: user_003
text: School infrastructure sahi lag rahi hai, wifi bhi better hua, good progress overall.

author: user_004
text: Aaj bazaar vibes were awesome, lekin traffic management bilkul bekaar tha.

author: user_005
text: Hospital service acha tha and staff were helpful, really happy with the response.

author: user_006
text: Water supply phir slow ho gayi, this is a serious problem for our area.

author: user_007
text: Police presence se thoda safe feel hua, but street lighting still bad in some lanes.

author: user_008
text: Festival event ka scene great tha, local shops also got good sales.

author: user_009
text: Public transport idea acha hai but implementation bohot slow and confusing.

author: user_010
text: Clean streets today, nice work by the city team, mood bilkul happy ho gaya.
